name: add_assoc
output:
```lean4
import Lean

theorem Nat.add_associative (a b c : ℕ) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) := by
  induction a with
  | zero => simp [Nat.add]
  | succ a ih =>
    calc ((a.succ) + b) + c = (a + b) + c.succ := by simp [Nat.add]
      _ = a + b + c := by simp [ih]
      _ = a.succ + (b + c) := by simp [Nat.add] final_value

name: or_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib

theorem propositional_disjunction_is_commutative (P Q : Prop) : P ∨ Q ↔ Q ∨ P := by
  classical
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h  · left; exact h
    | inr h  · right; exact h
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h  · left; exact h
    | inr h  · right; exact h
```

name: comp_injective
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib

theorem Function.Injective.comp {f g : α → β} :
  ∀ x y f g, Function.Injective f → Function.Injective g →
    Function.Injective (fun a => g (f a)) := by
  intro _ _ hf hg hxy
  simp only at hf hg hf hg hxy
  exact hg hf hxy
```
